Classical.description: Natural and clear, subtle sub-bass lift for room depth, flat mids.

Jazz.description: Warm mids, smooth highs to reduce cymbal harshness, tight acoustic bass.

Pop.description: Vocal forward, energetic highs, controlled 'commercial' bass.

Rock.description: Classic V-shape, boosting kick punch and electric guitar harmonics.

Electronic/EDM.description: Deep sub-bass impact, aggressive high-end sizzle for synths.

Hip-Hop/Rap.description: Dominant low-end, crisp vocal presence, slightly pulled back mid-range.

Metal.description: Heavy low-mids for guitar chugging, scooped mids, ultra-bright highs.

Country.description: Mid-range clarity for storytelling vocals and acoustic instrumentation.

Ambient/Experimental.description: Spacious, wide response, soft transitions, airy textures.
